mapper.sql: ss.station_id, s.name AS station_name, ss.name, ss.type, ss.status, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, ss.target_power_kw, ss.estimated_revenue_cny
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sa_station_strategy ss JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = ss.station_id ORDER BY s.sort_index

SELECT
FROM sa_station_strategy ss JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = ss.station_id WHERE ss.station_id = #{stationId} LIMIT 1
